textByHashes.2e03684eaa944d4b81b5663c75de4ff25337f5fd: Mum says I not to talk to strangers.
textByHashes.ddbf1c464372d7e9341f1fd49ad8a91e9867e51a: So I's can't says my name is Jeff.
textByHashes.b59edb6b6af7904da7d73ffc4a391d41ec04286a: We's be new here, on the bana plantion.
textByHashes.f86ca9501efcad6834625ad9cc45d31c52f7285d: Yeah, we's be new here. Anyway, I gonna go play now.
textByHashes.2ba8ce7449921a2d08c7b93d8b84aca31d24b09e: No, I not say. You have to guess.
textByHashes.6cf7dcb645a53327f7c4da8412a8f61f87f60905: How d'ya know that? Are you magic?
textByHashes.73ab80f67660403426644c4f4aaddc559086e1d0: If you were magic, you would know why the sea is blue... are you magic?
textByHashes.148359f81d9025323de0250f078425e03bc0dbfa: Oh, well. That's a bit sad. I was hoping you were magic and could magic me some sweets. But you can't, so I go find someone else who's magic. Bye.
textByHashes.571bab03bdb06564010d52af2d485b828b2cdd0e: Thanks so much for saving us from those stinky gublinch. They were awful! I hope Shanty gave you somefing cool for your efforts.
textByHashes.864f2b4bfce18b13a97c6b8c84176ebb7f25155a: Please excuse me, I'm rather busy.
